root_cause: CoreDNS is unavailable or has no ready endpoints

kube-dns Endpoints object has no ready addresses
No ready CoreDNS pods; degraded pod(s): coredns-76f75df574-8xq42, coredns-76f75df574-pv6rc
Recent CoreDNS event: Readiness probe failed: HTTP probe failed with statuscode: 503
Observed 3 CoreDNS failure event occurrence(s) within 20 minutes

causes.message: Workload depends on cluster DNS resolution for service discovery or startup dependencies
CoreDNS/kube-dns is degraded and cannot reliably answer DNS queries
Pod DNS lookups fail because the cluster DNS backend is unavailable

likely_causes: CoreDNS pods are crashlooping, failing probes, or unavailable
The kube-dns Service has no ready CoreDNS endpoints
The CoreDNS Deployment cannot maintain available replicas
CoreDNS configuration, upstream DNS forwarding, or node pressure is causing the DNS backend to fail
suggested_checks: kubectl get pods -n kube-system -l k8s-app=kube-dns -o wide
